titleStmt.title: SII 26.239: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 239. (A.R. No. 227 of 1909.) ŚŌḺAMĀDĒVI, UDUMALAIPET TALUK, COIMBATORE DISTRICT.

summary.p: North wall of the same temple.

This inscription records the gift of land in Āloḍūr for the tiruvottaśāma service to the goddess of the holy bedroom of the god Kulaiśēkharaīśvaramuḍaiyār of Śōḻamādēvinallūr in Karaivaḻi-nāḍu, by the king. It is stated that a request for a gift of land was submitted personally to the king by Araiśan Paṟaiyan alias Poyyāttamiḻ-nambi, a maṉṟaḍi-pūjaka of the same village. The service included food-offerings and a vāyvaḻinaḍai-śaṭṭi. Amongst the boundaries Kaṇṇāḍipputtūr is mentioned.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . viracoḻatevaṟku tiruveḻuttiṭṭuc cellāniṉṟa tirunalli Āṇṭu vatu karaivaḻināṭṭu coḻamātevinallūr Āḷuṭaiyār kulaicekara Īcuvaramuṭaiyār tiruppaḷḷiyaṟai nācciyāṟkut tiru
vottacāmappaṭṭi veṇṭumenṟu Ivvūr manṟāṭi pūcakari laraican paṟaiyanāṉa poyyāttamiḻnampi pakkale vantu namakkuc colli viṭuvitta niṟān nāiṭu Āloṭuril talaivayal maṉnaṟai nila
ttukku kalane tūṇikkum Ellaiyāvatu coḻamātevip peruvākkālukku meṟkkum kaṇṇāṭipputtūr Ellai kaṇṇāṟṟukku vaṭakkum Aiṅkalappaṟṟil naṭuvuccey nilattukku kiḻakkum koṇapoṭikkavarukku
teṟkum Innāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nellu vitai kalaṉetūṇiyum Amutupaṭi vāyvaḻinaṭaicaṭṭi Onṟuñ celvatākavum Innilattāl vanta Iṟai puravu cittāyam Elavai Ukavai maṟṟum
Eṟpeṟpaṭṭatuvuṅ koḷḷātomākac cantirāticcaṟ celvatāka na māruṭai poṟpeṭuttukkuṭukka nam Olaiyil Eḻuttuyiṭṭuk kuṭuttom Itu paṉmāyecura Irakṣai ...
Digital edition of SII 26.239 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
